hero.subtitle: Small, focused web apps for day-to-day agile practice — planning, facilitation, metrics, and team health.
stats.label: {{count}} tools — all free & open source
stats.empty_hint: No data yet — open any app below to get started.
data.hint: Back up all app data from this browser, or restore a previous backup.
data.export_empty: No app data found in this browser — nothing to export.
data.import_none: No recognised app data found in this file.
data.import_confirm_warn: Existing data for these apps will be overwritten.

workspace.empty: No workspaces yet — click Save current to create one.
footer.text: Practical tools for teams that ship together.
apps.moving_motivators.title: Moving Motivators
apps.moving_motivators.desc: Explore motivation and priorities with a familiar card-based exercise. Rank CHAMPFROGS motivators and assess change impact.
apps.scrum_facilitator.title: Scrum Facilitator
apps.scrum_facilitator.desc: Support scrum events and facilitation with clear, guided flows — timers, facilitation scripts, and retrospective tools.
apps.kanban_designer.title: Kanban Designer
apps.kanban_designer.desc: Design and iterate on boards and flow without fighting the tool. Visual guide to 10 Kanban board patterns.
apps.salary_formula.title: Salary Formula
apps.salary_formula.desc: Transparent, formula-based compensation models teams can reason about. Design fair salary formulas based on Management 3.0 principles.
apps.team_identity.title: Team Identity
apps.team_identity.desc: Align on who the team is and how you want to show up together. Digital facilitation of Identity Symbols and Work Expo practices.
apps.improvement_board.title: Improvement Board
apps.improvement_board.desc: Surface improvements, experiments, and follow-through from retros. Platform for Improvement Dialogues and Copilot Programs.
apps.work_profiles.title: Work Profiles
apps.work_profiles.desc: Roles, expectations, and how people prefer to collaborate. Reputation-over-titles portfolio for tracking contributions and skills.
apps.planning_poker.title: Planning Poker
apps.planning_poker.desc: Lightweight estimation sessions with a shared view of the table. Real-time tool with PIN-based team sessions and Fibonacci cards.
apps.sprint_metrics.title: Sprint Metrics
apps.sprint_metrics.desc: Burn-down, forecast, and sprint data in one place for the current iteration. Chrome extension for Jira with flow metrics.
apps.change_planner.title: Change Planner
apps.change_planner.desc: Structure and communicate change across teams and releases. Interactive planning based on the PDCA cycle and Jurgen Appelo's How to Change the World.
